patch.value: GH-651: pm activity bare relative windows silently return empty results

GitHub issue #651 reports that pm activity --from accepts plausible bare relative windows such as 7d, 1w, P7D, and now-7d but returns an empty success response, while -7d works and other invalid strings fail loudly. Normalize bare lower-bound windows to ago semantics or reject them consistently with an actionable grammar hint; document the accepted relative syntax.

pm activity --from 7d and equivalent supported bare windows either resolve deterministically to the intended ago bound or fail with invalid_argument_value; no invalid relative can silently masquerade as an empty activity set; help/contracts document accepted grammar; CLI and SDK regression tests cover valid, bare, and invalid forms

author: claude-code-agent
message: Link the adjacent compact activity response-shape issue.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Duplicate check evidence 2026-07-23: all-status searches for activity --from, bare relative windows, 7d/1w, and relative duration found pm-p3x4 for a distinct compact response decoy key plus older completed activity/duration work; no item covers the current silent-empty parser contract. Source: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/651
